name: com.gameup.core
description: Core framework for Unity game development including Singleton, EventBus, FSM, Object Pool, UI Manager, Audio, Save/Load, and more. Requires Demigiant DOTween with assembly DOTween.Modules (e.g. import DOTween from Asset Store into Assets/Plugins/Demigiant, or add a Git UPM mirror that exposes the same asmdef). Unity/OpenUPM do not ship an official com.demigiant.dotween package, so it cannot be listed as a transitive UPM dependency here.
